texto: [Hegel’s] system of nature seemed, at least to natural philosophers, absolutely crazy….Hegel…launched out with particular vehemence and acrimony against the natural philosophers, and especially against Isaac Newton. The philosophers accused the scientific men of narrowness; the scientific men retorted that the philosophers were insane.
explicacao: Citação de Hermann von Helmholtz sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “[Hegel’s] system of nature seemed, at least to natural philosophers, absolutely crazy….Hegel…laun…” articula reflexao, aesthetics, rebellion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como rebellion e science.
